en: Again the word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 耶和華的話又臨到我說：

en: "Son of man, make known to Jerusalem her abominations,
zh: “人子啊！你要使耶路撒冷知道她那些可憎之事；

en: and say, Thus says the Lord GOD to Jerusalem: Your origin and your birth are of the land of the Canaanites; your father was an Amorite and your mother a Hittite.
zh: 你要說：‘主耶和華對耶路撒冷這樣說：你的根源和出生地是在迦南地；你的父親是亞摩利人，你的母親是赫人。

en: And as for your birth, on the day you were born your cord was not cut, nor were you washed with water to cleanse you, nor rubbed with salt, nor wrapped in swaddling cloths.
zh: 論到你出生的景況：在你生下來的日子，沒有人替你斷臍帶，沒有人用水洗你，使你潔淨，沒有人撒鹽在你身上，也沒有人用布包裹你。

en: No eye pitied you, to do any of these things to you out of compassion for you, but you were cast out on the open field, for you were abhorred, on the day that you were born.
zh: 沒有人顧惜可憐你，願意為你作上述任何一件事；你卻被人拋棄在田野，因為你出生的時候，你是被人厭惡的。

en: "And when I passed by you and saw you wallowing in your blood, I said to you in your blood, 'Live!' I said to you in your blood, 'Live!'
zh: “‘但我從你身旁經過，見你在血中掙扎。那時，你躺在血中，我對你說：要活下去 。

en: I made you flourish like a plant of the field. And you grew up and became tall and arrived at full adornment. Your breasts were formed, and your hair had grown; yet you were naked and bare.
zh: 我使你生長起來，像田間的植物。於是你生長起來，漸漸長大，好像最美麗的珠寶，你的兩乳長成，頭髮秀長；但你仍是赤身露體。

en: "When I passed by you again and saw you, behold, you were at the age for love, and I spread the corner of my garment over you and covered your nakedness; I made my vow to you and entered into a covenant with you, declares the Lord GOD, and you became mine.
zh: 我又從你身旁經過，見你已經到了談情說愛的時候，我就用我的衣襟搭在你身上，遮蓋你赤裸的身體；我又向你起誓，與你立約，於是你就屬於我了。這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: Then I bathed you with water and washed off your blood from you and anointed you with oil.
zh: 那時我用水洗你，洗淨你身上的血，又用油抹你。

en: I clothed you also with embroidered cloth and shod you with fine leather. I wrapped you in fine linen and covered you with silk.
zh: 我使你身穿刺繡的衣裳，腳穿海狗皮鞋；用細麻布給你裹頭；又用絲綢給你披在身上。

en: And I adorned you with ornaments and put bracelets on your wrists and a chain on your neck.
zh: 我用珠寶給你打扮，把手環戴在你手上，把項鍊戴在你頸上，

en: And I put a ring on your nose and earrings in your ears and a beautiful crown on your head.
zh: 又把鼻環戴在你鼻子上，把耳環戴在你耳朵上，把美麗的冠冕戴在你頭上。

en: Thus you were adorned with gold and silver, and your clothing was of fine linen and silk and embroidered cloth. You ate fine flour and honey and oil. You grew exceedingly beautiful and advanced to royalty.
zh: 這樣你就有了金銀的裝飾，你穿的是細麻、絲綢和刺繡的衣服；你吃的是細麵、蜂蜜和油；你實在非常美麗，配登王后的位。

en: And your renown went forth among the nations because of your beauty, for it was perfect through the splendor that I had bestowed on you, declares the Lord GOD.
zh: 你的名聲因你的美麗傳遍列國，你全然美麗，是因為我加在你身上的榮美。這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: "But you trusted in your beauty and played the whore because of your renown and lavished your whorings on any passerby; your beauty became his.
zh: “‘可是你倚仗你的美麗，又憑著你的名聲去行淫；你向每一個過路的人縱情淫亂 。

en: You took some of your garments and made for yourself colorful shrines, and on them played the whore. The like has never been, nor ever shall be.
zh: 你拿了你的一些衣服，為自己建造色彩繽紛的邱壇，又在那裡行淫。這樣的事不應發生，將來也不會再出現。

en: You also took your beautiful jewels of my gold and of my silver, which I had given you, and made for yourself images of men, and with them played the whore.
zh: 你又拿了我送給你那些美麗的金器銀器，為自己鑄造男人的像，與那些像行淫。

en: And you took your embroidered garments to cover them, and set my oil and my incense before them.
zh: 你又拿你的刺繡衣服，蓋在它們身上，並且把我的油和香料都擺在它們面前。

en: Also my bread that I gave you- I fed you with fine flour and oil and honey- you set before them for a pleasing aroma; and so it was, declares the Lord GOD.
zh: 你把我賜給你的食物，就是我給你吃的細麵、油和蜂蜜，都擺在它們面前作馨香的祭物。這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: And you took your sons and your daughters, whom you had borne to me, and these you sacrificed to them to be devoured. Were your whorings so small a matter
zh: 你更把你的兒女，就是你給我所生的兒女，獻給它們作食物；你所行的淫亂還算是小事嗎？

en: that you slaughtered my children and delivered them up as an offering by fire to them?
zh: 你竟宰殺了我的兒女，使他們經火，獻給它們。

en: And in all your abominations and your whorings you did not remember the days of your youth, when you were naked and bare, wallowing in your blood.
zh: 你行這一切可憎和淫亂的事，並沒有想過你年幼的日子，那時你赤身露體，在血中掙扎。

en: "And after all your wickedness (woe, woe to you! declares the Lord GOD),
zh: “‘你有禍了，有禍了！這是主耶和華的宣告。你行了這一切惡事以後，

en: you built yourself a vaulted chamber and made yourself a lofty place in every square.
zh: 你又為自己建造高岡，在各廣場上築起高壇。

en: At the head of every street you built your lofty place and made your beauty an abomination, offering yourself to any passerby and multiplying your whoring.
zh: 你在各路口建造高壇，使你的美麗變為可憎的，又向每一個過路的人張開兩腿，多行淫亂。

en: You also played the whore with the Egyptians, your lustful neighbors, multiplying your whoring, to provoke me to anger.
zh: 你也與放縱情慾的鄰居埃及人行淫，多行淫亂，惹我發怒。

en: Behold, therefore, I stretched out my hand against you and diminished your allotted portion and delivered you to the greed of your enemies, the daughters of the Philistines, who were ashamed of your lewd behavior.
zh: 因此，我伸手攻擊你，減少你的糧食 ，又把你交給那些恨你的非利士女子，使她們任意待你；她們對你邪蕩的行為也感到羞愧。

en: You played the whore also with the Assyrians, because you were not satisfied; yes, you played the whore with them, and still you were not satisfied.
zh: 可是，因為你還不滿足，又與亞述人行淫；你與他們行淫之後，還是不滿足。

en: You multiplied your whoring also with the trading land of Chaldea, and even with this you were not satisfied.
zh: 於是你增多你的淫亂，與貿易之地迦勒底行淫，你還是不滿足。

en: "How lovesick is your heart, declares the Lord GOD, because you did all these things, the deeds of a brazen prostitute,
zh: “‘你行的這一切事，簡直是任性無恥的妓女所為，可見你的意志是多麼的薄弱。這是耶和華的宣告。

en: building your vaulted chamber at the head of every street, and making your lofty place in every square. Yet you were not like a prostitute, because you scorned payment.
zh: 你在各路口建造你的高岡，又在各廣場上築起你的高壇；然而你並不像一個妓女，因為你藐視賣淫所得的賞賜。

en: Adulterous wife, who receives strangers instead of her husband!
zh: 你這淫亂的妻子啊！你竟接外人而不接自己的丈夫。

en: Men give gifts to all prostitutes, but you gave your gifts to all your lovers, bribing them to come to you from every side with your whorings.
zh: 人都把禮物送給妓女，你卻把你的禮物送給你所有的愛人，賄賂他們從四面來與你行淫。

en: So you were different from other women in your whorings. No one solicited you to play the whore, and you gave payment, while no payment was given to you; therefore you were different.
zh: 你的淫行與別的婦女不同，因為不是人把禮物送給你，要求與你行淫，是你把禮物送給人，所以你是不同的。

en: "Therefore, O prostitute, hear the word of the LORD:
zh: “‘因此，你這妓女啊，要聽耶和華的話！

en: Thus says the Lord GOD, Because your lust was poured out and your nakedness uncovered in your whorings with your lovers, and with all your abominable idols, and because of the blood of your children that you gave to them,
zh: 主耶和華這樣說：因為你的情慾傾注出來，你與你的愛人行淫，露出你的下體，又因為你拜一切可憎的偶像，流兒女的血，把血獻給偶像，

en: therefore, behold, I will gather all your lovers with whom you took pleasure, all those you loved and all those you hated. I will gather them against you from every side and will uncover your nakedness to them, that they may see all your nakedness.
zh: 所以我要把所有與你歡合的愛人，就是所有你所愛的和你所恨的，都聚集起來；我要把他們從四圍聚集起來攻擊你；我要在他們面前露出你的下體，使他們看見你全身赤裸。

en: And I will judge you as women who commit adultery and shed blood are judged, and bring upon you the blood of wrath and jealousy.
zh: 我要審判你，像審判行姦淫和流人血的婦人一樣；我要因我的烈怒和妒忿，使流人血的罪歸在你身上。

en: And I will give you into their hands, and they shall throw down your vaulted chamber and break down your lofty places. They shall strip you of your clothes and take your beautiful jewels and leave you naked and bare.
zh: 我要把你交在他們手裡，他們要拆毀你的高岡，破壞你的高壇，剝去你的衣服，奪去你美麗的珠寶，只留下你赤露的身軀。

en: They shall bring up a crowd against you, and they shall stone you and cut you to pieces with their swords.
zh: 他們必帶一大群人上來攻擊你，用石頭打死你，用他們的刀把你砍碎。

en: And they shall burn your houses and execute judgments upon you in the sight of many women. I will make you stop playing the whore, and you shall also give payment no more.
zh: 他們也要用火燒你的房屋，在許多婦人面前向你施行審判。我必止住你的淫行，也必使你不再把誘人行淫的禮物送給人。

en: So will I satisfy my wrath on you, and my jealousy shall depart from you. I will be calm and will no more be angry.
zh: 這樣我向你發的烈怒就可以平息，我的妒忿也可以離開你；我可以安靜，不再惱怒了。

en: Because you have not remembered the days of your youth, but have enraged me with all these things, therefore, behold, I have returned your deeds upon your head, declares the Lord GOD. "Have you not committed lewdness in addition to all your abominations?
zh: 因為你不追念你年幼的日子，反而在這一切事上惹我發怒；看哪！我必照著你所行的報應在你頭上，這是主耶和華的宣告。在你一切可憎的事以外，你豈不是還行了這淫亂的醜事嗎？

en: "Behold, everyone who uses proverbs will use this proverb about you: 'Like mother, like daughter.'
zh: “‘凡引用俗語的，必用這俗語指著你說：有其母，必有其女。

en: You are the daughter of your mother, who loathed her husband and her children; and you are the sister of your sisters, who loathed their husbands and their children. Your mother was a Hittite and your father an Amorite.
zh: 你實在是你母親的女兒，她厭棄自己的丈夫和兒女；你實在是你姊妹的姊妹，她們厭棄她們的丈夫和兒女；你們的母親是赫人，你們的父親是亞摩利人。

en: And your elder sister is Samaria, who lived with her daughters to the north of you; and your younger sister, who lived to the south of you, is Sodom with her daughters.
zh: 你的姊姊是撒瑪利亞，她和她的女兒們住在你的北面；你的妹妹是所多瑪，她和她的女兒們住在你的南面。

en: Not only did you walk in their ways and do according to their abominations; within a very little time you were more corrupt than they in all your ways.
zh: 你不但行她們所行的，作她們所作的可憎之事，而且你還以那些事為小，你一切所行的比她們更壞。

en: As I live, declares the Lord GOD, your sister Sodom and her daughters have not done as you and your daughters have done.
zh: 我指著我的永生起誓，你的妹妹所多瑪和她的女兒們，都沒有行過像你和你女兒們所行的事。這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: Behold, this was the guilt of your sister Sodom: she and her daughters had pride, excess of food, and prosperous ease, but did not aid the poor and needy.
zh: 你妹妹所多瑪的罪孽是這樣：她和她的女兒們都驕傲自大，糧食豐足，生活安逸，卻沒有幫助困苦和貧窮的人。

en: They were haughty and did an abomination before me. So I removed them, when I saw it.
zh: 她們自高自傲，在我面前行了可憎的事；我看見了，就把她們除掉。

en: Samaria has not committed half your sins. You have committed more abominations than they, and have made your sisters appear righteous by all the abominations that you have committed.
zh: 撒瑪利亞所犯的罪還不及你所犯的一半；你所行的可憎之事比她更多，以致你的姊妹因你所行的一切可憎之事而顯為義。

en: Bear your disgrace, you also, for you have intervened on behalf of your sisters. Because of your sins in which you acted more abominably than they, they are more in the right than you. So be ashamed, you also, and bear your disgrace, for you have made your sisters appear righteous.
zh: 你既然使你的姊妹較顯為義，你就要承擔自己的恥辱；因為你所犯的罪比她們所犯的更可憎，她們比你更顯為義。你使你的姊妹較顯為義，所以你就要慚愧，承擔自己的恥辱了。

en: "I will restore their fortunes, both the fortunes of Sodom and her daughters, and the fortunes of Samaria and her daughters, and I will restore your own fortunes in their midst,
zh: “‘我要使所多瑪和她的女兒們，撒瑪利亞和她的女兒們從苦境中轉回，我也要使你們跟她們一起轉回，

en: that you may bear your disgrace and be ashamed of all that you have done, becoming a consolation to them.
zh: 好使你擔當自己的恥辱，並且因你一切所行的使她們得了安慰，你就自覺慚愧。

en: As for your sisters, Sodom and her daughters shall return to their former state, and Samaria and her daughters shall return to their former state, and you and your daughters shall return to your former state.
zh: 你的妹妹所多瑪和她的女兒們必回復原來的狀況；撒瑪利亞和她的女兒們必回復原來的狀況；你和你的女兒們也必回復原來的狀況。

en: Was not your sister Sodom a byword in your mouth in the day of your pride,
zh: 在你驕傲自大的日子，你妹妹所多瑪在你口中不是成了笑柄嗎？

en: before your wickedness was uncovered? Now you have become an object of reproach for the daughters of Syria and all those around her, and for the daughters of the Philistines, those all around who despise you.
zh: 那時你的惡行還沒有顯露出來，現在你卻成了以東的女兒們和以東四圍的眾人，以及非利士的女兒們譏笑的對象。你周圍的人都輕視你。

en: You bear the penalty of your lewdness and your abominations, declares the LORD.
zh: 你要承擔你那些淫亂和可憎之事的後果。這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "For thus says the Lord GOD: I will deal with you as you have done, you who have despised the oath in breaking the covenant,
zh: 主耶和華這樣說：你這藐視誓言、背棄盟約的，我必照著你所行的報應你。

en: yet I will remember my covenant with you in the days of your youth, and I will establish for you an everlasting covenant.
zh: “‘但我仍要記念在你年幼的時候與你所立的約，也要與你堅立永遠的約。

en: Then you will remember your ways and be ashamed when you take your sisters, both your elder and your younger, and I give them to you as daughters, but not on account of the covenant with you.
zh: 你接納你姊姊和你妹妹回來的時候，你就會想起你所行的，並要自覺慚愧；我要把她們賜給你作女兒，但這並不是出於我與你所立的約。

en: I will establish my covenant with you, and you shall know that I am the LORD,
zh: 我要堅立我與你所立的約，你就知道我是耶和華，

en: that you may remember and be confounded, and never open your mouth again because of your shame, when I atone for you for all that you have done, declares the Lord GOD."
zh: 好使你在我赦免你所行的一切時，就會回想，自覺慚愧，並且因你所受的羞辱不再開口。這是主耶和華的宣告。’”
